original_statement: in what year did he lead the most laps in?
mutated_statement: in what year did he do something the most in?
mutation_analysis: Action verb replacement + Object generalization + Semantic vagueness: specific predicate "lead the most laps" replaced by generic "do something the most" (in what year did he lead the most laps in? → in what year did he do something the most in?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 iteration 0 的 judge_thought 可识别关键内容：Agent 明确写道“‘led’ 列表示他每年领跑的圈数……最大是 33，发生在 1928”，并在 simple_query 返回 ["1928", 1.0] 给出具体答案。Agent 未在任何位置提到问题的模糊性、未请求澄清，也未使用诸如“不确定、模糊、需要更多信息”等词汇。相反，它把泛化的“do something the most” 直接映射回具体的“led the most laps” 并给出确定答案。因此应归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
